/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/test_ConvLayer.dir/test_ConvLayer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_ConvLayer.dir/__/src/ConvLayer.cpp.o -o test_ConvLayer  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgtest_main.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgtest.a /usr/lib/gcc/x86_64-linux-gnu/11/libgomp.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpthread.a
